titleStmt.title: SII 9.177: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 177. (A.R. No. 94 of 1904.) ON THE 10TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 33, Sarvadhāri, Pushya, ba. 5, Bṛihavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkarānti corresponding to A.D. 1108 December 24, Thursday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva is stated to have been ruling Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand. Maleyāḷa-Vaḍḍabevahāri Komara-Mūrka is stated to have made a gift of gadyāṇas 5 for the service of the god Svyambhu-Kalidēva out of the interest accruing from the sum.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārā
jādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhu
vanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpa
jīvi © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ
kāṁcīpuravarēsvaraṁ yadvaṁsāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacū
ḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷama
nōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādājjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādi
samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara tri
bhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticcā
siramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadi(ṁ)nāḻdu sukhadi rā
jyaṁgeyyuttamire © svasti samastaguṇasaṁpannarappa
śrīmatu hariścandradattiyagrahāraṁ bāḷguḷiyū
roḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁbara sannidhānadoḷ
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣa 33 neya sarbbadhā
risaṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 5 bṛhavāra vuttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāntiyaṁdu koḷemūkka paṟaṁbugāda samastaguṇasaṁpanna
rappa maleyāḷavaḍḍabevahāri komaramūrkka śrīsvayaṁbhuka
lidēvasvāmidēvargge naṁdādīvigeya naḍesuvantāgi śrīma
tu sivasaktijīyara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa ga
dyānavaydu Ā poṁge vriddhiya koṇḍu naḍasutta bapparu Ī dha
rmmamanayvadiṁbaru pratipāḷisuvarī dharmmama naḍeyisidavaru pra
yāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷu sāsirbbarvvēdapāragargge sā
sira kavileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumida
naḷidātanā puṇyasthānadoḷanitu kavileyumananiba
ru brāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakamakku ©
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣa
sahaśrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © sarasvatiga
si koḷakaraṇi kāḷaya barada kaṇḍarisida celu
Digital edition of SII 9.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
